title: epipactis flava
intro: Epipactis flava, also known as the yellow helleborine, is a type of orchid native to Europe and parts of Asia, characterized by its greenish-yellow flowers and grass-like leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Epipactis flava include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Epipactis flava can be prepared as a tea or tincture, although its use is not well-researched and should be done under the guidance of a medical professional.
